message:
test(sync): wave 2 invariant tests + clippy fixes for pool, once_cell, contended_mutex

Adds 6 new invariant tests across 3 modules and fixes clippy lints from wave 1:

contended_mutex.rs (2 tests):
- try_lock_returns_poisoned_after_panic: verifies try_lock returns Poisoned after
  thread panic, recovers data through PoisonError
- hold_time_recorded_on_panic_in_critical_section: (lock-metrics) verifies hold_ns
  recorded even when guard is dropped via panic

once_cell.rs (1 test):
- get_or_try_init_error_resets_state: verifies error path resets cell to UNINIT,
  allowing subsequent successful initialization

pool.rs (3 tests):
- pool_cancel_during_wait_does_not_leak_waiter: drops acquire future mid-
  WaitForNotification, verifies waiter cleaned from queue
- pool_exhaustion_blocks_then_unblocks_on_return: blocks acquirer at capacity,
  returns resource, verifies unblock
- pool_factory_error_releases_create_slot: factory error releases
  CreateSlotReservation via RAII, no phantom slot leak

Clippy fixes:
- barrier.rs: rename handle_result/handle2_result to first_party/third_party
  (similar_names lint)
- rwlock.rs: rename tr_poisoned/tw_poisoned to read_is_poisoned/write_is_poisoned
  (similar_names lint)
- mutex.rs, notify.rs, semaphore.rs: minor formatting adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
